Setting.name: NVTGC
Setting.Description: Please enter ALL, ILL, or a specific NVTGC

Setting.name: RequestType
Setting.Description: Please enter Article, Loan, or Both

Setting.name: BorDocDelTransactionStatus
Setting.Description: Transaction Status that Addon will scan for Hathi Updates (use either Borrowing or Doc Del status)

Setting.name: LendingTransactionStatus
Setting.Description: Transaction Status that Addon will scan for Hathi Updates

Setting.name: FieldChoice
Setting.Description: Field that addon will place Hathi Trust URL into if a possible item is found.

Setting.name: RouteToBorDocDel
Setting.Description: Status in Borrowing or Doc Del that addon will route to if Hathi has materials requested.

Setting.name: RouteToLending
Setting.Description: Status in Lending that addon will route to if Hathi has materials requested.

Setting.name: FlagThis
Setting.Description: Flag that addon will assign if Hathi has materials requested.
